items.title: Despite Late Rally, Purdue Falls to Iowa 8-7
items.summary: Purdue (32-19, 9-13 Big Ten) mounted a late push but ultimately fell to Iowa, 8-7, on Friday evening at Bob Pearl Field.

items.title: Van Assen's Quality Start Leads Baseball to 30th Win
items.summary: Manias homers for 3rd time in last 5 games as Purdue wins series opener 7-5

items.title: Boilermakers Scuffle on Day 1 of Big Ten Championships
Purdue vs Murray St. Game 1 Highlights
2 Victories Lead Purdue on Friday
3 Boilers Earn Softball America Honors
items.summary: Three Purdue softball players land on the latest Softball America position rankings, heading into the final conference weekend of the season.

items.title: Purdue Athletics Raises Record $16.1 Million on Purdue Day of Giving
items.summary: The 2026 total of $16.1 million surpasses the previous high mark of $13 million set in 2024

items.title: Bottom of the Lineup Leads the Way in Purdue Win vs USI - Highlights
Purdue Posts 8 Zeros to Win Homestand Opener 5-1
items.summary: Bessette leads the way as the bottom third of the lineup enjoys an 8-for-12 night

items.title: Purdue Earns 11th Straight NCAA Regional Berth
Polar Named USA Softball Top 25 Player of the Year Finalist
items.summary: Just days after earning Purdue's Female Athlete of the Year award, Moriah Polar becomes the first-ever Purdue softball player to be named to the USA Softball Top 25 Player of the Year finalist list.

items.title: This Week in Purdue Baseball | April 28, 2026
Boilermakers Add Guard Aysia Proctor
Boilermakers Place 3rd, Best B1G Finish Since 2019
Purdue at USC Game 3 Highlights
Boilers Suffer 1-0 Heartbreaker in Home Series Finale
items.summary: Purdue (32-18, 9-12 Big Ten) fell 1-0 in a pitcher’s duel to the Northwestern (27-19, 14-7 Big Ten) Wildcats on Sunday afternoon at Bittinger Stadium.

items.title: Purdue Held to Season-Low Run Total in 6-1 Loss
Purdue Moves Into 2nd at B1G Championships
Boilers Fall 11-4 on Senior Day
items.summary: Purdue (32-17, 9-11 Big Ten) fell 11-4 in game two of the series against Northwestern on senior day in West Lafayette.

items.title: Bases-Loaded Opportunities Go by the Board in 4-3 Loss at USC
items.summary: Van Assen retires 13 consecutive batters but Purdue kept off the scoreboard after the 2nd inning
